hello: I Bring Your Vision to Life
name: Can Surer
aboutIntro: Frontend Developer with 3+ years of professional experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Proven track record shipping large-scale products — including platforms with up to 20 million active users — in agile teams across international environments.
aboutSpecialization: Experienced with state management (Redux Toolkit, MobX), microfrontend architecture, CI/CD pipelines, REST API integration, and security-critical feature development. Strong attention to detail — I implement pixel-perfect designs from Figma with cross-browser compatibility.
avicaBullet1: Built a web-based video editor (React.js, Konva.js): template-based video generation with real-time rendering
avicaBullet2: Integrated 25+ RESTful APIs into dynamic tables with filtering, sorting and pagination (TanStack Table)
avicaBullet3: Migrated state management from MobX to Redux Toolkit — improved performance and scalability
avicaBullet4: Implemented AWS S3 data streaming, reducing thumbnail load times and eliminating unnecessary re-renders
avicaBullet5: Developed reusable UI components with cross-browser compatibility
sisalBullet1: Delivered 3 microfrontend modules for a platform serving 20M+ active users
sisalBullet2: Wrote 70+ unit and integration tests ensuring production stability
sisalBullet3: Implemented security-critical features including session management and access control
tpBullet1: Managed workforce planning for 7 projects with 200+ agents using Teleopti and Excel
tpBullet2: Progressed from backoffice operations to Real-Time Management to WFM Analyst
tpBullet3: Led a 2-person team in schedule optimization and forecasting
himmelbergText: Can has provided an excellent work and accommodated our ongoing requests very smoothly. He has never pushed us to make payment, instead we've paid in installments until we were sure everything was done, and we were satisfied with his work. He has not only built our UI/UX request on React but also provided additional solutions and advice for upcoming features as well. He was able to not only build the website from scratch, but also host the website on Google Firebase. We are happy to count him as one of our own teammates rather than a simple freelance job.
avicaTestimonialText: I am pleased to recommend Can Surer, who worked as a Front-End Developer at IN4COM GmbH from March 2023 to February 2025. During his tenure, Can Surer consistently demonstrated strong technical skills, creativity, and a commitment to delivering high-quality results. He started as junior front-end developer and over the period of 2 years has grown to good mid-level developer. He worked with React technical stack and built and integrated the front-end solutions for the AVICA application. Among other things he implemented complicated custom components for video editor. He excelled in developing user-friendly, responsive web interfaces and showed proficiency in modern front-end technologies and proved to be the valuable asset to our team. I can confidently recommend Can Surer for the front-end developer role.
